member_long_descriptions: Square black frame with a wide white mat holding a sailboat print; glass produces a noticeable rectangular glare/reflection and the image is slightly blurred/low-resolution; frame appears wall-mounted and mostly visible in the crop; approximate distance ~3.0 m from camera.

White painted rectangular picture frame holding a glass-covered beach scene print with a thin black inner border; frame shows minor scuffs and slight discoloration and is partially cut off by the crop, estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

Square black frame with white double mat containing a sailboat print under glass; visible glare/reflection on the glass and slight blur/compression artifacts, appears fully visible (not edge-cropped), approx. 2.0 m from camera.

White-painted rectangular picture frame containing a small colorful beach-scene print (orange/yellow umbrella over blue sea) with a thin inner mat; frame shows minor scuffs and is partially edge-cropped in the image — estimated camera distance ~1.2 m.
clusters.representative_description: Square black frame with a wide white mat holding a sailboat print; glass produces a noticeable rectangular glare/reflection and the image is slightly blurred/low-resolution; frame appears wall-mounted and mostly visible in the crop; approximate distance ~3.0 m from camera.

member_descriptions: black leather three-seat couch edge crop
dark brown leather recliner front crop
member_long_descriptions: Glossy dark brown leather couch with vertical channel-padded back, visible stitched seams and creasing, padded armrests with built-in cup holders; right side and parts of the back are cropped at the image edge — approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Close-up of a partial black leather three-seat couch with glossy, slightly creased upholstery, stitched seams and segmented padded back cushions; right armrest visible and the crop is edge-cut, photographed at approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.

Front-facing, partially edge-cropped dark brown leather recliner/couch with glossy, worn leather surface, prominent horizontal stitched seams and deep cushion wrinkles; plush padded armrests and a compressed seat cushion suggest a single-seat recliner appearance, right edge slightly cut off and top marginally cropped — estimated ~1.2 m from camera.

Close-up (~1.2 m) view of a dark brown/black glossy leather two-seat recliner/loveseat with pronounced vertical padded back cushions and stitched seam details; visible cupholder and padded arm on the right, creased leather surface, and both left and right edges of the couch are partially cropped by the image border.

Close-up of a dark glossy leather three-seat couch with padded, vertically segmented back cushions and stitched seat panels; right armrest and the right portion of the couch are visible and the object is partially cropped at the image edge, estimated about 0.8 m from the camera.

Front-facing dark brown leather recliner-style couch with glossy, creased upholstery and visible stitched seams; overstuffed, padded cushions and armrests with surface wrinkles indicate soft/worn material, shown in a close-up view approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up of a dark glossy leather three-seat couch with padded, vertically segmented back cushions and stitched seat panels; right armrest and the right portion of the couch are visible and the object is partially cropped at the image edge, estimated about 0.8 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: light beige woven rug edge crop
dark brown varnished side table edge
dark brown glossy side table edge
dark wood cabinet upper doors cropped
member_long_descriptions: Small dark brown wooden side table/cabinet with a single paneled door, a narrow drawer above, and two round knobs; molded base and rectangular vertical form with a glossy finish, mostly fully visible in the crop (approx. 0.8 m from camera).

Light beige, low-pile woven floor rug with subtle mottled texture and low contrast pattern that fills most of the crop; the rug appears rectangular, the top edge is cut off by the image (edge-cropped) and a darker shadowed area is visible at the right — photographed from roughly 1.2 m above.

Partial beige low-pile rug with a light woven texture and a faint darker border visible against a wooden baseboard; the rug is cut off at the top and left edges of the crop and appears about 0.8 meters from the camera.

Dark navy rectangular low-pile floor rug occupying most of the crop; appears medium-to-large in size with a smooth, even surface laid flat on a light-colored floor, with left and bottom edges cropped by the image; approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.

Partial/edge crop of a dark brown varnished wooden side table showing a vertical panel with a curved top corner, glossy finish, visible scuffs and subtle wood grain, and a lighter worn/beveled trim along the right edge; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.7 m).

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown stained-wood upper cabinet door section with recessed/raised rectangular panels and a semi-gloss finish; lower portion of the cabinet is cut off by the crop and the top sits near a yellow wall — estimated distance ~1.2 m from camera.

Dark-stained wooden dining table side with vertical paneled base and a beige tablecloth overhanging the top; crop shows the table's edge and side panels (partial/edge-cropped) with a small white sticker on the right panel, visible cloth fringe and slight scuffing at the base — approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple frame molding; vertically oriented and partially cut off at the right edge of the crop, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Front-facing dark reddish-brown wooden side table with a single shallow drawer above a paneled cabinet door, molded top and base trim, round dark knob hardware and a polished varnished surface; medium-sized and mostly visible in the crop with only slight left-edge cropping, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Flat, low-pile light-beige rectangular rug with a subtle woven/speckled texture visible across the surface; the rug is edge-cropped in this image with a darker shadow at the right side, appearing clean and laid flat — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped beige low-pile rug seen as a narrow horizontal strip in the foreground with subtle speckled texture and a faint darker border; appears close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m away).

Low-pile, solid dark navy/charcoal rectangular floor rug occupying most of the crop; straight edges visible but top/right are partially cropped by the image border, lying flat on a wooden floor about 1.2 m from the camera.

Partial/cropped close-up of a dark brown, glossy-finished side table edge showing a rounded vertical corner with visible wear or scuffing and subtle wood-grain or veneer texture; image is tightly framed and the object appears photographed from about 0.6 m away.

Partial, edge-cropped view of dark brown stained wooden upper cabinet doors showing three vertical raised-panel sections with a subtle matte finish and no visible handles; appears to be an upper kitchen cabinet photographed from approximately 1.2 m away.

Close-up of a tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a vertical rectangular raised center panel and simple molded frame; surface appears matte with light scuffs, and the door is partially edge-cropped in this narrow vertical crop (approx. 0.8 m from camera).

Close-up of a lower dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and raised molding; glossy varnish with visible scuffs and small chips at the edges, right side of the door is cropped by the image; appears to be a lower cabinet near the floor, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Partial lower section of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet with vertical recessed panels and a central seam between doors; scuffed and slightly worn base with a low-sheen finish, edge-cropped in the image and appearing close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).
clusters.representative_description: Close-up of a lower dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and raised molding; glossy varnish with visible scuffs and small chips at the edges, right side of the door is cropped by the image; appears to be a lower cabinet near the floor, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Rectangular black metal fireplace insert with a glass front showing a dark, unlit interior and a single soot-stained log or ceramic log; glass is slightly reflective and the metal frame shows minor wear and ash residue, visible from roughly 1.5 meters away.

Black rectangular metal fireplace insert with a glass front revealing a dark, empty firebox and a light-colored ash or log-shaped remnant on the base; interior shows soot/dust staining around the edges; frontal near-camera view, approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Rectangular black metal fireplace insert with a glass front showing a dark, unlit interior and a single soot-stained log or ceramic log; glass is slightly reflective and the metal frame shows minor wear and ash residue, visible from roughly 1.5 meters away.

member_long_descriptions: Large dark rectangular reflective window showing a dim interior reflection of a staircase, table lamp, and furniture; glass appears slightly blurred or smudged and the crop is edge-cut so the frame is partially visible — approximate distance ~2.0 m from camera.

Dark rectangular reflective glass window showing a dim interior reflection (table lamp, staircase, faint seated silhouette); surface appears glossy and slightly blurred in low light, with visible glare and halo around the lamp; the window is partially cropped by the image edges. Approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.
clusters.representative_description: Large dark rectangular reflective window showing a dim interior reflection of a staircase, table lamp, and furniture; glass appears slightly blurred or smudged and the crop is edge-cut so the frame is partially visible — approximate distance ~2.0 m from camera.

member_long_descriptions: Small white tabletop lamp with a scalloped fabric lampshade and visible stitched trim, white/ivory textured ceramic base with decorative detailing and a turquoise object at the base; lower-left of the lamp is cropped/partial in the image; estimated height ~30–45 cm and approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Off-white pleated fabric shade table lamp with a scalloped, trimmed rim and an ornate white ceramic base with textured/figurative detailing; small tabletop size, visible partially cropped at the left edge of the crop and viewed from about 0.6 m away.
clusters.representative_description: Small white tabletop lamp with a scalloped fabric lampshade and visible stitched trim, white/ivory textured ceramic base with decorative detailing and a turquoise object at the base; lower-left of the lamp is cropped/partial in the image; estimated height ~30–45 cm and approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden chair shown close-up with carved cabriole-style legs, a visible stretcher between legs, glossy finish and a dark (possibly upholstered) seat; photographed approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Ornate dark reddish-brown lacquered wooden chair with a pierced, carved backrest, curved front legs and a visible front stretcher; patterned upholstered seat is partially visible and the sides are slightly edge-cropped in the narrow vertical crop — appears to be photographed at approximately 1.5 meters distance.

Partial, edge-cropped dark chair showing a triangular seat corner and a vertical backrest as a dark silhouette against a lighter background; single front leg and frame visible, appears to be a dark-stained wooden or solid-frame chair in low lighting, photographed close to camera (approx. 1.2 m).

Ornate dark reddish-brown wooden chair with a carved, pierced backrest and solid seat; front legs and stretcher visible, sides slightly edge-cropped — medium-sized dining/side chair approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown carved wooden dining chair with ornate turned legs and a dark upholstered seat cushion; glossy finish and some visible scuffing on the lower stretcher, appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m).

Partial dark wooden chair visible at the right edge of the crop — a vertical narrow backrest and a small corner of the seat are shown, edge-cropped and upright; appears to be about 0.7 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Ornate dark reddish-brown lacquered wooden chair with a pierced, carved backrest, curved front legs and a visible front stretcher; patterned upholstered seat is partially visible and the sides are slightly edge-cropped in the narrow vertical crop — appears to be photographed at approximately 1.5 meters distance.

member_descriptions: stainless steel microwave front, black door
member_long_descriptions: Stainless-steel microwave front with a large black glass door showing two illuminated interior lights; reflective metal trim and a blurred right-side control panel are visible, slightly edge-cropped and seen from close range (approx. 0.8 m).

Partial, close-up view of a stainless-steel oven lower front (approx. 0.8 m from camera) showing a black glass door window and a horizontal handle draped with a white tea towel; image is edge-cropped at the sides and bottom and shows brushed metallic finish with light reflections.

Partial, edge-cropped stainless-steel oven front seen close-up (approx. 1.2 m away) with a horizontal handle draped by a white striped towel and a darker cloth, lower oven door and drawer visible, reflective metallic finish and slight smudging on the surface; crop focuses on the mid-lower front of the appliance.

Close frontal view of a stainless steel countertop microwave showing a reflective dark glass door with two visible interior light reflections, a vertical black control panel on the right and a horizontal door handle; the appliance fills most of the crop and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).
clusters.representative_description: Close frontal view of a stainless steel countertop microwave showing a reflective dark glass door with two visible interior light reflections, a vertical black control panel on the right and a horizontal door handle; the appliance fills most of the crop and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).

member_long_descriptions: Full-height stainless steel double-door refrigerator with vertical center handles and reflective metallic surface showing smudges and faint reflections; occupies most of the crop and is slightly edge-cropped at the sides, estimated distance ≈ 1.5 m from camera.

Full-frontal stainless steel double-door refrigerator with centered vertical handles and a left-door water/ice dispenser, reflective slightly smudged surface and modern flat-panel doors; approximately 1.5 m from camera.
clusters.representative_description: Full-height stainless steel double-door refrigerator with vertical center handles and reflective metallic surface showing smudges and faint reflections; occupies most of the crop and is slightly edge-cropped at the sides, estimated distance ≈ 1.5 m from camera.
